sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85653" key="ponhro/polis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πονηρό-πολις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n85653.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Roguetown,</tr_> a nickname given to some place by Philip, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0566.tlg001:107" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theopomp.Hist.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">107</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.520b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
